steps.expected: Desktop header visible with Refresh button
steps.observed: Desktop header visible with Refresh button - snapshot shows 'button "Refresh"'

steps.expected: Desktop header hidden, mobile accordion visible
steps.observed: Mobile accordion visible - snapshot shows 'button "Die drei ??? Ready"'. Desktop Refresh button replaced by collapsible accordion.

steps.expected: Layout shows single column, mobile accordion with compact status
steps.observed: Layout correctly shows mobile accordion with compact status 'Die drei ??? Refreshing…' (app name + short status indicator)

steps.expected: Mobile accordion visible in collapsed state
steps.observed: Accordion trigger shows compact status 'Die drei ??? Refreshing…'

steps.expected: Accordion expands showing full status content with Refresh button
steps.observed: Accordion expanded successfully - snapshot shows 'button "Die drei ??? Refreshing…"[expanded]' and 'button "Refresh catalog" [disabled]'

steps.expected: Accordion collapses smoothly, expanded content hidden
steps.observed: Accordion collapsed successfully - expanded content no longer visible in snapshot, back to compact trigger only

summary: Tested 2 assertions: both passed. VAL-CROSS-004 confirmed desktop-to-mobile layout adaptation works correctly - desktop header (Refresh button) is visible at 1024x768, replaced by mobile accordion (compact status) at 767x1024. VAL-CROSS-005 confirmed mobile accordion expand/collapse functionality works smoothly with animation (waited 300ms for animation completion). No console errors observed during testing.
